text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text: In the Arima Kinen, T.M. Opera O had no chance of winning. Trapped in a pack so tight she was lost in its shadows. Nonetheless…

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text: …she made her presence known. Weaving through the pack, she seized an unprecedented victory. Her words afterwards were: "Where there is no precedent, I only have to set one."

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text: In an interview, Grass Wonder told us: "I pulled the Arima victory towards me. With sheer willpower." We all saw the result.

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text: It was a narrow victory for her. However, instead of following in the footsteps of previous Arima winners, she sought her own ideal path, and reached a new peak.

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text: Speed Symboli. The first horsegirl in history to achieve three consecutive Grand Prix victories. She spoke of her final race like this: "In the end, it comes down to guts!"

text_block_list.name: Narrator
text_block_list.text: Her victory came by a neck over the runner-up. It wasn't about repeating the previous year's Arima Kinen. Her final race was meant to surpass her own great achievements ——

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer… Trainer! 
Th-That was… That was amazing…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
No, really… From my perspective, I always thought everyone 
was so calm, or rather… that they won because they were 
meant to win. That was the impression I had, but…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
But… yeah, that's right. Watching the footage again… 
they were just giving it their all. There was a gritty foundation 
of sheer tenacity and guts underlying it all.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I see… The ones who can make history are those who… 
even in a fiercely competitive race… can still seize victory 
with their "willpower".

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…There wasn't a single one. Not a single person 
who established history by "tracing" the past.

I don't think learning from the past is inherently wrong. 
However, to achieve greatness… maybe you need to put 
your own raw, authentic self on the stage ——
choice_data_list: <size=32>Because the one running on the turf right now is you</size>.
<size=32>Because the one running on the turf right now is you</size>.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ……Me. Chrono Genesis… on the big stage…

And so, Tracen Academy's Open Day was upon us. 
As for Chrono Genesis…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Hahh, hah, hahh, hah…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (2200 m on turf. The track condition is yielding due to yesterday's rain. Conditions overall are close to the Takarazuka Kinen that Nakayama won.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Outside of the middle of the pack… the position Nakayama took. 
But, when Orfevre ran, she was a little more…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Ghk! I'm overthinking again…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Can I produce the explosive power needed for a 34.7 seconds 
final sectional? If I can't, I shouldn't try to imitate the past.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Because the one running today is…

…Her running was becoming exactly what I wanted to see. 
Because what caught my eye during the practice race was…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…I can hear Trainer's voice, cheering for me. 
Me, and no one else.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(That's right. The one running here today is… not any of 
the girls who wove together the fabric of history.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: It's me, who is still a nobody.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(In that case, I just need to use history as a rough guide. 
As long as I have a mental image, the rest is up to me!)

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa! With 200 m left, Chrono Genesis makes her final push! What a magnificent closing sprint! Will she reach the lead?! 
Will she make it?!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(Up until now, I've been chasing after history. 
I wanted to catch up… I wanted to be there, too.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(But that's wrong. I can't become a part of history that way. 
If I want to leave my own footprints…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I have to win… I want to win. I want to win! Against the horsegirls who crafted history! Against my celebrated predecessors!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (And then… next time, I'll be the one to…)

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Chrono Genesis crosses the finish line in first place! 
A victory by two lengths! She's shown off her true strength!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Way to go, Chrono Genesis!! That was a great race!!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
That was so moving! When's her debut?! 
I'm looking forward to it!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (……Looking forward to my debut… Does that mean…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(That they want to follow my history…? 
Is that what they're thinking?)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Ah, that's it.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: This is the form it should take…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …I'm back.
choice_data_list:
That was an amazing race. I'm looking 
forward to your next one!

That was an amazing race. I'm looking 
forward to your next one!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Ah, thank you so much. 
But, umm…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: The reason I was able to run like this is…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
……Did they feel like this, too? 
All of them…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (…It's scary to say it out loud. But I have to take that step forward.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Because I want it to be… this person.)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: U-Umm… Trainer… If you wouldn't mind…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…No. I want to ask this of you, specifically…! 
Please, won't you ——

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Create history with me?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Countless true stories that make your heart leap with every turn of the page. And on its newest pages, someday… my story.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I want to write a new page of history.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: This is the story of my… of our challenge. (Writer C)
